title: Filter dates in pivot view
excerpt: I would like to be able to select range of dates for the pivot widget. Right now I am only able to see all dates from inception or one particular date from the list.

posts.author: kbogorova (Katerina Bogorova)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to be able to select range of dates for the pivot widget. Right now I am only able to see all dates from inception or one particular date from the list.
